delta.tokens: +6% more tokens (55K vs 52K — skill agent explored historical data more thoroughly)
delta.duration: +18% slower (256s vs 217s — skill agent did deeper extraction including historical UBOs)
delta.quality: With-skill produces structured output template (Sumar, tables, zlte stopy) and deeper analysis (historical UBOs, authorized person changes). Baseline failed on output template (eval 1). With-skill had Playwright flakiness on Alanata search (eval 2) — a browser reliability issue, not skill design. Both variants successfully extract UBO data and cross-reference. The skill adds value primarily in output structure and analytical depth (e.g., WAY INDUSTRIES flagged UBO change + frequent verifier changes).

notes: Eval 2 with-skill Alanata false negative is a Playwright search flakiness issue — the RPVS search returned 0 results for ICO 54629331 despite the company being registered (baseline confirmed vlozka 37284). Adding retry/fallback guidance to the skill could mitigate this.
